---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or script support
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Type of Feature
- [ ] New script support
- [ ] Improvement to existing transliteration
- [ ] New API feature
- [ ] Performance enhancement
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Use Case
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How do you envision this feature working?

## Script Details (if requesting new script)
- Script name: 
- ISO code: 
- Unicode range: 
- Special considerations: 

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information, code samples, references, or Unicode documentation.
